title: Version string 1.3.0rc4 while CHANGELOG heading is released [1.3.0]
evidence: pyproject.toml:7 and cli.py:208 = 1.3.0rc4; CHANGELOG has released [1.3.0] - 2026-07-20 + empty [Unreleased]
impact: Promotion to final 1.3.0 requires dropping rc4 suffix; shipping rc4 as final would be a version mismatch

title: CITATION.cff software version stale at 1.1.0
evidence: CITATION.cff:16 version: \1.1.0\"; last touched at 1.1.0-era commit 0f42f7c; repo is at 1.3.0 line"
impact: Citation metadata misrepresents current release version to anyone citing the software
recommended_action: Sync CITATION.cff version to the release version at bump time

title: AGENTS.md references non-existent RELEASING.md and CONTRIBUTING.md
evidence: AGENTS.md:28 says 'see RELEASING.md' and 'See CONTRIBUTING.md'; neither file exists in repo root or elsewhere
impact: Contributor/novice following AGENTS.md hits dead references; erodes trust in docs
recommended_action: Either create the referenced docs or reword AGENTS.md to point at existing homes (README/DECISIONS/plans README)
